# Install Ollama
# Clone workspace repos

# Pull Ollama model
echo "Pulling embedding model..."
ollama serve &
sleep 3
ollama pull nomic-embed-text
pkill ollama || true

echo "=== Post-Create Complete ==="
```

**Step 4: Write post-start.sh**
